data.content: Boosted settings with stronger purple/green visual treatment across sheet shell, repos/actions/pools cards, and OpenRouter controls/table interaction states while preserving behavior. Quality gates passed: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1945 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Feature branch commit b0811e7d35ed integrated to origin/main as e39715f6aafe.
